description: Style Note Summer fashion demands a wardrobe filled with stylish tank tops to go with your shorts and capris. Keep it cool and casual in these tops from jealous 21. Product Details Purple top with black shaded print in the front and crystal embellishments, has batwing short sleeves, round neck and rouche detailing on the right side Material and Care 100% viscose Hand wash or machine wash with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8&rdquo and chest 33&rdquo ) is wearing a size M
